Enumeration Case# kUSBLowLatencyReadBuffer

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.2+

```
kUSBLowLatencyReadBuffer = 1
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/usblowlatencybuffertype/kusblowlatencyreadbuffer#discussion)

The buffer will be used to read data from a device.
